name: OpenMM Temperature Replica Exchange
description: Enhanced conformational sampling using temperature replica exchange molecular dynamics (T-REMD). Overcome energy barriers by exchanging replicas across temperature ladder. Generate thermodynamically weighted ensembles with improved sampling efficiency.
capabilities: Enhanced conformational sampling using temperature replica exchange molecular dynamics (T-REMD)
Overcome energy barriers by exchanging replicas across temperature ladder
Generate thermodynamically weighted ensembles with improved sampling efficiency

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for T-REMD simulation

ligand_file.description: Ligand structure in SDF format for protein-ligand T-REMD

simulation_time_ns.description: Simulation time per replica in nanoseconds

min_temperature_k.description: Minimum temperature in Kelvin for the temperature ladder

max_temperature_k.description: Maximum temperature in Kelvin for the temperature ladder

num_replicas.description: Number of temperature replicas in the exchange ladder
